summary: Completed comprehensive testing of authentication, settings, dark mode, AI persona, and navigation features. Backend APIs fully functional (33/33 tests passed). Frontend login flows, settings page, dark mode toggle, and AI persona display working correctly. Minor session persistence inconsistency identified.

session_issues.issue: Intermittent session persistence - sometimes direct navigation to /student redirects to login page
session_issues.details: Session works after fresh login and page refresh, but direct URL navigation sometimes fails

passed_tests: Teacher login (teacher@vocabulous.app / teacher123) with redirect to /teacher
Student login (student@vocabulous.app / student123) with redirect to /student
Teacher navigation links (Dashboard, Classes, Heatmap, Bottlenecks)
Student navigation links (Dashboard, Study, Research, Blurting, Progress, Achievements)
Teacher name 'Dr. Sarah Chen' visible in nav
Student name 'Updated Test Name' visible in nav (from settings update)
Settings page loads with profile, appearance, password sections
Dark mode toggle in settings (light/dark theme switching)
Dark mode toggle in navigation bar
AI persona display: 'The Consistent Sprinter' with grit score 65/100
